jsonLd.title: Lupin is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Lupin has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Lupin:
Lupin is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lupin!
